title: stygnanthe moesta
side_effects: Stygnanthe moesta can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of saponins. In addition, excessive consumption may lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. If not prepared correctly, the plant's toxic compounds can cause neurological problems, including dizziness, confusion, and even seizures. Furthermore, improper use of Stygnanthe moesta can also lead to kidney damage and increased risk of bleeding, especially in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions.
